CVE-2020-21722.summary: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in oggvideotools 0.9.1 allows remote attackers to run arbitrary code via opening of crafted ogg file.

CVE-2020-21723.summary: A Segmentation Fault issue discovered StreamSerializer::extractStreams function in streamSerializer.cpp in oggvideotools 0.9.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via opening of crafted ogg file.
